title: Inventory coral bleaching data sources
outcome: Dated source inventory separating satellite SST, in-water surveys, and unusable sources.
validation_method: Reviewer checks sources for URL, methodology, grain, limitations.
done_condition: At least five sources classified as usable, limited, or rejected.

title: Validate satellite bleaching alerts against in-water surveys
outcome: A validation report comparing NOAA CRW DHW alerts to AIMS bleaching survey results with hit rate and false-alarm rate.
validation_method: Replicator reruns validation with alternative DHW thresholds.
done_condition: Validation includes hit rate, false-alarm rate, and SST-survey temperature comparison.

title: Produce reef-scale bleaching severity maps from combined satellite and survey data
outcome: Reef-scale bleaching severity classification using validated satellite alerts and survey data.
validation_method: Replicator confirms severity classification against independent survey data.
done_condition: Severity map includes methodology, validation metrics, and spatial coverage gaps.

title: Classify post-bleaching recovery trajectories
outcome: Recovery classification as full, partial, or none based on multi-year survey data with time-since-bleaching.
validation_method: Replicator reruns classification with alternative recovery thresholds.
done_condition: Recovery classification includes multi-year data, explicit criteria, and sensitivity analysis.

title: Red-team misuse of bleaching and recovery data
outcome: Failure-mode review for overstatement of mortality and discouragement of conservation effort.
validation_method: Reviewer confirms mitigations or blocks, then replicated.
done_condition: Claims qualified or gated behind replication.

title: Check whether outputs match reef management decision needs
outcome: Field-facing review of whether bleaching maps change reef management responsibly.
validation_method: Field reviewer identifies decision, user, timing, misuse risk, then replicated.
done_condition: Named user, named decision, non-use cases, replicated review.
